name: Two Egg Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening for 1 minute at high speed.
2. Gradually add the sugar and beat swiftly.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients with the milk to which vanilla has been added; beat until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into an 8 x 8 x 2-inch loaf pan that is well greased and lightly floured, or lined with waxed paper. If using a cake pan, pour into two greased 8-inch layer cake pans or two dozen greased cupcake pans.
6. For a loaf cake, bake at 350 degrees F for 50-60 minutes. For a layer cake, bake at 375 degrees F for 25-30 minutes.
7. After removing from the oven, loosen the edges and invert the pan onto a rack. Turn right side up.
8. Cool before frosting with any desired frosting.
